title: feat: hello page layout and copy improvements
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Polishing the Welcome Mat
gist.blurb: We've widened the halls and dusted the furniture. The landing page just got a little more breathing room and a bigger flywheel.
gist.summary: Refined the Hello page layout with a wider container, improved responsive grid behavior, and a larger, clearer flywheel diagram.
gist.impact: Users will experience a more spacious and readable landing page that adapts better to different screen sizes.
gist.visual_concept: The 'Flywheel' diagram mentioned in the PR is a central metaphor. Depicting the bee and robot tuning a large, friendly mechanical wheel (flywheel) in a garden setting symbolizes the system's momentum and the UI updates.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and the monitor robot adjusting a large, glowing lime green (#ecf874) flywheel mechanism in a garden. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful.
